title: rubus lanyuensis
intro: Rubus lanyuensis, also known as the Lanyu raspberry or Lanyu black raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Taiwan. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of anthocyanins, which are powerful antioxidants that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus lanyuensis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus lanyuensis can be used in various herbal preparations, including tea, juice, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
